there should lowkey be a documentary made about the history of envy/rankers once the year is over and their slow-mo explosion is complete. there's so much juicy and sketchy stuff in there with how the team was formed and all the people floating around them and the pug teams all the rankers guys were in, to the roster changes when joining the league and especially the stuff with inspire, and all the personalities in that space, plus the cane stuff too. once it all comes out or maybe if someone's able to investigate and put it all in the doc. would go so hard.
